data.body: Stack now 9 commits (added f088 amended w/ gerrit-verify wiring, + 0435 golden-path extractor both CI files). KEY DISCOVERY: gerrit-verify.yaml IS the Verified gate (mirrors test.yml drift gates); parity test test_ci_workflow_parity enforces every scripts/*.py in test.yml also in gerrit-verify.yaml. f088/0435 wired both (parity passes). 0435 held-out TDD 8/8 incl session-log-defect-caught + block-selection. Redesigned e866: curated intercept dict (no fragile subprocess capture -> sidesteps enrich --help JSON gotcha) + ladder-parity guard + both CI files. Updated 235a for both CI files. Re-reviewing e866+235a.
